description: Baseline run for the new solver3 objective autoresearch lane: 6-case fixed-time solver3 bundle + solver3 correctness corpus + fixed-iteration and raw-runtime diagnostics.

Reinitialized the solver3 objective autoresearch metric to a 100x readability scale, but the baseline launch crashed immediately because the root and delegated autoresearch scripts had lost their executable bits.

Rebased the solver3 objective lane to a 100x readability scale while keeping the existing per-case score metrics as the primary interpretability aid; new baseline under the scaled metric is dominated by transfer-attribute-balance drift.

name: Solver3 fixed-time objective-quality autoresearch (x100 scale reset)
